title: MadCat's Hitboxes
description: Turn off the hitbox of every single entity in the game!
body:
This mod lets you customize the rendering of specific hitboxes to your liking. This includes:
- turn off the hitbox of any entity, including player states like flying with an Elytra or sneaking
- turn off your own hitbox (I don't know why that's not already a Minecraft feature)
- turn off the look vector (the blue line that indicates where an entity looks at)

You can fully customize that in the mod's config, which is accessible in the Fabric Mod Menu

I might add more content to this mod, like coloring the hitboxes. If you have some good ideas, just dm me on Discord (its_madcat)!
